sql_array: CREATE TABLE time_data (event_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, event_timestamp TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO time_data (event_id, event_timestamp) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 12:30:00');
INSERT INTO time_data (event_id, event_timestamp) VALUES (2, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 15:45:30');
UPDATE time_data SET event_timestamp = TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 16:00:00' WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, date_part('hour', event_timestamp) AS event_hour FROM time_data;
